infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Ally to access your camera to take photos and videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Ally to access your photo library to share and save images.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow Ally to access your microphone for voice input.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Allow Ally to use speech recognition to transcribe your voice messages.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Ally uses your calendar to add reminders as events so you never miss what matters.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Ally uses your calendar to add reminders as events so you never miss what matters.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsWriteOnlyAccessUsageDescripti: Ally uses your calendar to add reminders as events so you never miss what matters.
